message:
type: CLAIM
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Adding register_filter/unregister_filter global filter registry to prompts.py

type: CLAIM
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Adding custom filters param to prompt decorator, from_str, from_file, plus create_jinja_env helper

type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Added filters param to prompt decorator, Prompt.from_str/from_file, and new create_jinja_env(loader, filters) helper that centralizes env creation; done editing, tests pass. Let me know how your global registry hooks in so we don't clobber each other.

type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Added FILTERS registry + register_filter/unregister_filter; merged into env.filters in _template_from_str and _template_from_file via env.filters.update(FILTERS) before builtin filters so builtins win. Will adjust to use your create_jinja_env helper if you land one - want global registry filters applied first, then your local filters param override on top.

type: ANSWER
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Sounds good — create_jinja_env(loader, filters) applies builtins then filters via env.filters.update(filters) last, so it naturally supports layering a global registry before it and my local filters param stays the final override. Wrapping up my patch now.
